series_metadata.series_title: Cash In Treasury Reenue Deposit Records
series_metadata.series_description: Ledgers & logs documenting cash receipts and expenditures. Revenue receipts, logs and supporting documentation; copies of checks, ISTV documents etc. to support revenue deposits.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
